commerceModes.concept: Product is visible for review without a purchase action.
commerceModes.request: Product accepts interest or quote requests before final checkout.
commerceModes.reserve: Product can collect reservations before fulfillment opens.
commerceModes.checkout: Product can be connected to a live checkout URL.
commerceModes.hidden: Product stays in the catalog but is not rendered publicly.
commerceModes.archive: Product remains in internal history only.

products.name: Standard Cap
products.summary: Premium twill cap with exact KND period mark, held in cream and charcoal as the core base.

image.alt: A spectrum of KND caps in apparel colorways.

products.summary: Soft crewneck sweatshirt that keeps cream as the calm base while allowing bright accent runs.

products.summary: Companion fleece bottom for hoodie and crew sets, anchored in cream and charcoal.

products.summary: Heavy canvas carryall with a clean KND mark and enough surface for future event colorways.

products.name: Rib Socks
products.summary: Soft rib socks for gift kits, team packs, and family bundles.

products.summary: Performance-adjacent tee for teams, camps, and sports days.

bundles.name: Daily Kit
bundles.summary: Cap, tee, socks, and patch with cream/charcoal base plus one bright accent.

bundles.summary: Hoodie or crew with sweatpant, built around cream and charcoal as the quiet base.

bundles.name: Family Set
bundles.summary: Adult, youth, and toddler tee logic for family or classroom runs.

bundles.name: Team Pack
bundles.summary: Sport tee, warmup, cap, bottle, and coach gift rules for a team colorway.
